benefits.description: Semaglutide provided superior appetite suppression and food noise reduction; user would forget to eat
Maintained meals and portion control on Retatrutide

side_effects.description: Reduced appetite suppression compared to Semaglutide; experiences cravings that were absent on Semaglutide

protocol_notes: Switched from Semaglutide after 9 months to Retatrutide. Took two-week break between compounds. Prefers Retatrutide as superior product (3-agonist vs 1-agonist). Plans to increase Retatrutide dose and potentially add Cagrilintide for appetite support.
